exact.from: description:"Mark Agent commits as 'Made with Cursor'"
exact.to: description:"将 Agent 提交标记为「Made with Cursor」"

exact.from: description:"Mark pull requests as made with Cursor"
exact.to: description:"将拉取请求标记为由 Cursor 创建"

exact.from: description:"Prefix for new branches created by Agent (e.g., cursor/, username/)"

title:"使用指定模型新建 Agent"
title:"新建 Agent（保留编辑器面板）"
在新建 Agent 中构建

exact.from: Create an agent to start working on tasks
exact.to: 创建 Agent 以开始处理任务

exact.from: Mirror VS Code RPCs into the DevTools Network tab and record local performance marks. Adds overhead, so leave it off unless you're debugging.
exact.to: 将 VS Code RPC 镜像到 DevTools Network 标签页并记录本地性能标记。会增加开销，仅在调试时开启。

exact.from: Control which network requests are allowed when commands run in the sandbox. Edit allowed/denied domains in sandbox.json in your workspace.
exact.to: 控制沙箱中命令运行时允许的网络请求。可在工作区 sandbox.json 中编辑允许/拒绝的域名。

exact.from: Allow Agent to switch modes without asking first, such as Agent to Plan or Agent to Debug. When off, Cursor asks before switching.
exact.to: 允许 Agent 无需询问即可切换模式，例如从 Agent 到 Plan 或 Debug。关闭后，Cursor 会在切换前询问。

exact.from: Log extension host RPC messages to JSON files viewable in Perfetto for performance analysis. Requires a restart to take effect.
exact.to: 将扩展宿主 RPC 消息记录为可在 Perfetto 中查看的 JSON 文件，用于性能分析。需要重启后生效。

exact.from: Domains that Agent can fetch from automatically. Use '*' for all domains, '*.example.com' for wildcard subdomains.
exact.to: Agent 可自动抓取的域名。使用 '*' 表示所有域名，'*.example.com' 表示通配子域名。

exact.from: Maximum number of Cursor-managed worktrees to retain across all workspaces. Older worktrees are removed first.
exact.to: 跨所有工作区保留的 Cursor 管理工作树最大数量。较旧的工作树会优先被移除。

exact.from: These domains must be accessible for Cursor to function. Add them to your firewall or proxy allowlist.
exact.to: 这些域名必须可访问，Cursor 才能正常工作。请将其加入防火墙或代理白名单。

exact.from: Control tokens control how likely the model is to produce no-ops. Will be replaced with auto-selection
exact.to: 控制 Token 决定模型输出空操作的可能性。将被自动选择替代

exact.from: Use the legacy terminal tool in agent mode, for use on systems with unsupported shell configurations
exact.to: 在 Agent 模式使用旧版终端工具，适用于不受支持的 shell 配置

exact.from: Maximum total size in GB across all Cursor-managed worktrees. Set to 0 to disable the size limit.
exact.to: 所有 Cursor 管理工作树的最大总大小（GB）。设为 0 可禁用大小限制。

exact.from: Show inline diff decorations in the editor instead of only showing changes in the review panel
exact.to: 在编辑器中显示行内差异装饰，而不仅在审查面板中显示更改

exact.from: Enable on-demand usage to go beyond your plan's included usage. Requires a paid plan.
exact.to: 启用按需用量以超出套餐包含用量。需要付费套餐。

exact.from: Connect GitHub/GitLab, manage team and user settings, and configure environments
exact.to: 连接 GitHub/GitLab，管理团队与用户设置，并配置环境

exact.from: Select your preferred embedding model. Delete your index and reload to use it.
exact.to: 选择你偏好的嵌入模型。删除索引并重新加载后生效。

exact.from: Context-aware, multi-line suggestions around your cursor based on recent edits
exact.to: 基于近期编辑、在光标周围提供上下文感知的多行建议

exact.from: Custom words that submit a voice prompt. Spaces and punctuation are ignored.
exact.to: 用于提交语音提示的自定义词。空格和标点将被忽略。

exact.from: Prevent sleep when this computer is plugged in and Remote Control is enabled
exact.to: 此电脑接通电源且启用远程控制时防止休眠

exact.from: Suggest edits like new lines and indentation that modify whitespace only
exact.to: 建议仅修改空白的编辑（如新行和缩进）

exact.from: Adjust the default behavior of sending a message while Agent is running
exact.to: 调整 Agent 运行时发送消息的默认行为

exact.from: Posts Self-driving updates to Slack when there are suggestions for PRs.
exact.to: 当有 PR 建议时，将自动驾驶更新发布到 Slack。

exact.from: Accelerate development, shared knowledge, and context across your team
exact.to: 加速团队协作、知识共享与上下文同步

exact.from: Automatically run Review when Agent finishes and has made file changes
exact.to: 当 Agent 完成并修改文件后自动运行审查

exact.from: Include untracked files (new files not yet added to Git) in the review
exact.to: 在审查中包含未跟踪文件（尚未添加到 Git 的新文件）

exact.from: Choose whether automatically started agents suggest or apply changes
exact.to: 选择自动启动的 Agent 是建议更改还是应用更改

exact.from: When all editors are closed, hide the editor area and maximize chat
exact.to: 关闭所有编辑器时，隐藏编辑器区域并最大化对话

exact.from: Disable AI features in specific repositories based on file pattern
exact.to: 根据文件模式在特定仓库中禁用 AI 功能

exact.from: Create your own themes, tweak the vibe, and import your favorites
exact.to: 创建自定义主题、调整风格并导入你喜欢的主题

exact.from: Minimize interface animations. System follows your OS preference.
exact.to: 尽量减少界面动画。跟随系统偏好设置。

exact.from: Choose how much detail Agent tool calls show in the conversation
exact.to: 选择 Agent 工具调用在对话中显示的详细程度

exact.from: Partially mask your email address in the Cursor user interface
exact.to: 在 Cursor 界面中部分遮罩你的邮箱地址

exact.from: Choose the model used by Explore subagent for initial research
exact.to: 选择 Explore 子 Agent 用于初步研究的模型

exact.from: Automatically review your changes for issues after each commit
exact.to: 每次提交后自动审查更改中的问题

exact.from: When to show the usage summary at the bottom of the chat pane
exact.to: 何时在对话面板底部显示用量摘要

exact.from: Starts Self-driving when a PR opens on an enabled repository.
exact.to: 在已启用仓库打开 PR 时启动自动驾驶。

exact.from: Open pull request links inside Cursor or the default browser
exact.to: 在 Cursor 内或系统默认浏览器中打开拉取请求链接

exact.from: Enable or disable Self-driving for PRs owned by this account
exact.to: 启用或禁用此账户拥有的 PR 的自动驾驶

exact.from: Choose whether the theme behaves like a light or dark theme
exact.to: 选择主题表现为浅色还是深色

exact.from: Make escape focus editor instead of closing the prompt bar
exact.to: 按 Escape 时聚焦编辑器，而不是关闭提示栏

exact.from: Wait indefinitely; otherwise skip prompts after 30 seconds
exact.to: 无限等待；否则 30 秒后跳过提示

exact.from: Import settings, extensions, and keybindings from VS Code
exact.to: 从 VS Code 导入设置、扩展和快捷键

exact.from: Show Add to Chat & Quick Edit buttons when selecting code
exact.to: 选中代码时显示“添加到对话”和“快速编辑”按钮

exact.from: Glob patterns for files where Cursor Tab will not suggest
exact.to: Cursor Tab 不提供建议的文件 glob 模式

exact.from: Start Self-driving automatically for enabled repositories
exact.to: 对已启用仓库自动启动自动驾驶

exact.from: Files to exclude from indexing in addition to .gitignore
exact.to: 除 .gitignore 外还需从索引中排除的文件

exact.from: Off disables Self-driving for PRs owned by this account.
exact.to: 关闭后将禁用此账户拥有的 PR 的自动驾驶。

exact.from: Optional folder for RPC logs (defaults to logs/exthost).
exact.to: RPC 日志的可选文件夹（默认 logs/exthost）。

exact.from: Choose the theme used when your system is in dark mode
exact.to: 系统处于深色模式时使用的主题

exact.from: Allow the agent to celebrate with a shower of confetti
exact.to: 允许 Agent 用彩带庆祝

exact.from: Allow Agent to search the web for relevant information
exact.to: 允许 Agent 搜索网络以获取相关信息

exact.from: Include third-party Plugins, Skills, and other configs
exact.to: 包含第三方插件、技能和其他配置

exact.from: Cmd+K: Escape focuses the editor when you have a diff
exact.to: Cmd+K：存在差异时 Escape 聚焦编辑器

exact.from: Match the active theme to your OS dark/light setting
exact.to: 使活动主题与操作系统的深色/浅色设置匹配

exact.from: Set a fixed amount or make on-demand usage unlimited
exact.to: 设置固定额度，或将按需用量设为无限制

exact.from: Automatically import agent configs from other tools
exact.to: 自动从其他工具导入 Agent 配置

exact.from: Automatically format files when the agent finishes
exact.to: Agent 完成后自动格式化文件

exact.from: Show terminal commands in compact view by default
exact.to: 默认以紧凑视图显示终端命令

exact.from: Include changes from Git submodules in the review
exact.to: 在审查中包含 Git 子模块的更改

exact.from: Configure HTTP compatibility for proxies and VPNs
exact.to: 为代理和 VPN 配置 HTTP 兼容性

exact.from: Check network connectivity to all Cursor services
exact.to: 检查与所有 Cursor 服务的网络连通性

exact.from: Sign in to get started with Cursor's AI features
exact.to: 登录以开始使用 Cursor 的 AI 功能

exact.from: Allow Agent to switch modes without asking first
exact.to: 允许 Agent 无需询问即可切换模式

exact.from: Automatically parse links pasted into Quick Edit
exact.to: 自动解析粘贴到快速编辑中的链接

exact.from: Show a view zone when the preview box is clipped
exact.to: 预览框被裁剪时显示视图区域

exact.from: Embed the codebase for contextual understanding
exact.to: 嵌入代码库以实现上下文理解

exact.from: Use legacy terminal tool on unsupported shells
exact.to: 在不受支持的 shell 上使用旧版终端工具

exact.from: Automatically format files when Agent finishes
exact.to: Agent 完成后自动格式化文件

exact.from: Use the preview box instead of shell streaming
exact.to: 使用预览框而不是 shell 流式输出

exact.from: Allow Tab to trigger while in a comment region
exact.to: 在注释区域中也允许触发 Tab

exact.from: Force the display of view zones in the editor
exact.to: 强制在编辑器中显示视图区域

exact.from: Configure font, formatting, minimap and more
exact.to: 配置字体、格式化、缩略图等

exact.from: Override the font for code editors and diffs
exact.to: 覆盖代码编辑器和差异对比的字体

exact.from: Limit how many chat tabs can be open at once
exact.to: 限制可同时打开的对话标签页数量

exact.from: Change the base URL for OpenAI API requests.
exact.to: 更改 OpenAI API 请求的基础 URL。

exact.from: Bring your Claude Code sessions into Cursor.

exact.from: Override the Cursor user interface typeface

exact.to: 显示“添加到对话”和“快速编辑”按钮

exact.to: 配置本地 Agent LLM 网关

exact.from: HTTP/2 is recommended for low-latency streaming. In some corporate proxy and VPN environments, the compatibility mode may need to be lowered.
exact.to: 推荐使用 HTTP/2 以获得低延迟流式传输。在部分企业代理或 VPN 环境中，可能需要降低兼容模式。

exact.from: Use AI-powered command classification to intelligently match commands against allowlist patterns and suggest sandbox modes
exact.to: 使用 AI 命令分类，智能匹配白名单模式并建议沙箱模式

exact.from: Wait indefinitely to authenticate when prompted. When off, skip authentication prompts after 30 seconds.
exact.to: 出现身份验证提示时无限期等待。关闭后，30 秒后跳过身份验证提示。

exact.from: You can configure Shell, MCP and Fetch allowlists for Auto mode. However, Auto works well without these.
exact.to: 可为 Auto 模式配置 Shell、MCP 和 Fetch 白名单。不过不配置也能正常使用 Auto。

exact.from: Generates a robust implementation plan prior to writing code, asking clarifying questions when needed.
exact.to: 在编写代码前生成稳健的实现计划，必要时会提出澄清问题。

exact.from: This marketplace and its access settings will be removed. The source repository won't be affected.
exact.to: 将移除此市场及其访问设置。源仓库不会受到影响。

exact.from: Pinpoints the root cause of an issue by generating hypotheses and gathering runtime evidence.
exact.to: 通过生成假设并收集运行时证据，定位问题根因。

exact.from: Commands that always require approval, even when Auto mode would run them automatically
exact.to: 即使在 Auto 模式通常会自动执行时，也始终需要批准的命令

exact.from: Uses a fleet of subagents to parallelize requests, instead of adding them to a queue.
exact.to: 使用一组子 Agent 并行处理请求，而不是加入队列。

exact.from: Show inline diff review controls in top level breadcrumbs or floating island
exact.to: 在顶层面包屑或浮动岛中显示内联 diff 审阅控件

exact.from: Temporarily save uncommitted work, then check out the cloud agent branch.
exact.to: 临时保存未提交的工作，然后检出云端 Agent 分支。

exact.from: Automatically update plugins when changes are pushed to the repository
exact.to: 当更改推送到仓库时自动更新插件

exact.from: Create a checkpoint commit of your changes, then check out the branch.
exact.to: 为当前更改创建检查点提交，然后检出该分支。

exact.from: Permanently discard your current changes before switching branches
exact.to: 切换分支前永久丢弃当前更改

exact.from: The current value cannot be preserved and the field will be empty.
exact.to: 当前值无法保留，该字段将为空。

exact.from: Choose the model used by the Explore subagent for initial research
exact.to: 选择 Explore 子 Agent 用于初步调研的模型

exact.from: Select who can see and use plugins from this team marketplace
exact.to: 选择谁可以查看并使用此团队市场中的插件

exact.from: Choose between quick or more thorough, higher-cost analysis
exact.to: 在快速分析与更彻底但成本更高的分析之间选择

exact.from: This will remove the custom theme from your saved themes.
exact.to: 这将从已保存的主题中移除该自定义主题。

exact.from: Delete your current uncommitted changes before switching
exact.to: 切换前删除当前未提交的更改

exact.from: Merge blocked: required status checks are still running
exact.to: 合并已阻止：必需的状态检查仍在运行

exact.from: The git worktree for this agent is no longer on disk.
exact.to: 此 Agent 的 git 工作树已不在磁盘上。

exact.from: When Agent decides it's relevant based on description
exact.to: 当 Agent 根据描述判断相关时

exact.from: Runs in the remote extension host for this workspace.
exact.to: 在此工作区的远程扩展宿主中运行。

exact.from: Fetch marketplace plugins from the GitHub repository
exact.to: 从 GitHub 仓库获取市场插件

exact.from: Creates a new MCP configuration with example servers
exact.to: 创建包含示例服务器的新 MCP 配置

exact.from: Create a checkpoint commit with your current changes
exact.to: 用当前更改创建检查点提交

exact.from: OpenAI-compatible API base URL for the local agent.
exact.to: 本地 Agent 的 OpenAI 兼容 API 基础 URL。

exact.from: Save your changes to a stash and restore them later
exact.to: 将更改保存到贮藏区，稍后恢复

exact.from: Use full local environment (non-VM running locally)
exact.to: 使用完整本地环境（非虚拟机本地运行）

exact.from: Proceed anyway (changes might not apply correctly)
exact.to: 仍要继续（更改可能无法正确应用）

exact.from: Your changes will be lost if you don't save them.
exact.to: 若不保存，更改将会丢失。

exact.from: Merge blocked: required status checks are failing
exact.to: 合并已阻止：必需的状态检查失败

exact.from: Save changes to a stash and restore them later
exact.to: 将更改保存到贮藏区并稍后恢复

exact.from: Merging is blocked by branch protection rules
exact.to: 合并被分支保护规则阻止
跨整个应用的全局存储

exact.from: Cmd+K inline edit attached to prompt bar
exact.to: 附加到提示栏的 Cmd+K 内联编辑

exact.from: Save your changes and restore them later
Apply to every chat and cmd-k session
exact.to: 应用于每次聊天和 Cmd+K 会话

exact.from: When file matches a specified pattern
exact.to: 当文件匹配指定模式时
合并已阻止：与基线冲突

exact.from: This pull request cannot be merged

exact.to: 合并已阻止：已请求更改

exact.from: Waiting on a dependency or cycle
Anyone with the link can access
exact.to: 任何有链接的人都可以访问
所有团队成员均可访问

exact.from: Cloud Agents Not Supported in Privacy Mode (Legacy)
exact.to: 隐私模式（旧版）不支持云端 Agent

exact.from: Plugins give your agents important context
exact.to: 插件可为 Agent 提供重要上下文

exact.from: Approve Pending Shell Tool and Allowlist
exact.to: 批准待处理 Shell 工具并加入白名单
云端 Agent 需要代码存储
需要云端 Agent 环境

exact.from: Cloud Agents require a Git repo
exact.to: 云端 Agent 需要 Git 仓库
通过 MCP 连接外部工具

exact.from: Failed to switch to Cloud Agent
exact.to: 切换到云端 Agent 失败

exact.from: Failed to Send Prompt to Agent
exact.to: 向 Agent 发送提示失败
重试云端 Agent 失败
启动云端 Agent 失败
批准待处理 Shell 工具
工作区不在 Git 根目录
将 GitHub 连接到 Cursor

exact.from: Hooks let you run custom scripts at specific points during the agent's execution to modify behavior, enforce policies, or add custom logging.
exact.to: 钩子可让你在 Agent 执行的特定节点运行自定义脚本，以修改行为、强制策略或添加自定义日志。

exact.from: Use Rules to guide agent behavior, like enforcing best practices or coding standards. Rules can be applied always, by file path, or manually.
exact.to: 使用规则引导 Agent 行为，例如强制最佳实践或编码标准。规则可始终应用、按文件路径应用，或手动应用。

exact.from: When to display the usage summary at the bottom of the chat pane: automatically when approaching limits, always, or never.
exact.to: 何时在聊天窗底部显示用量摘要：接近限额时自动显示、始终显示或从不显示。

exact.from: Path to a custom sound file (mp3, wav, ogg) to play when Agent finishes responding. Leave empty to use the default sound.
exact.to: Agent 完成回复时播放的自定义音效文件路径（mp3、wav、ogg）。留空则使用默认音效。

exact.from: Sign in to load cloud user and team MCP servers from the dashboard and manage which servers are enabled for cloud agents.
exact.to: 登录后可从控制台加载云端用户与团队 MCP 服务器，并管理云端 Agent 启用的服务器。

exact.from: With Privacy Mode enabled, none of your questions or code will ever be stored or learned from by us or any third-party.
exact.to: 启用隐私模式后，我们或任何第三方都不会存储或学习你的问题或代码。

exact.from: When enabled, translucent surfaces and vibrancy effects are replaced with opaque backgrounds for improved readability.
exact.to: 启用后，半透明表面和振动效果将替换为不透明背景，以提高可读性。

exact.from: Create specialized agents for complex tasks. Subagents can be invoked by the agent to handle focused work in parallel.
exact.to: 为复杂任务创建专用 Agent。子 Agent 可由 Agent 调用，以并行处理专注工作。

exact.from: Subagents are specialized assistants that run in their own context window so Agent can parallelize and stay focused.
exact.to: 子 Agent 是在独立上下文窗口中运行的专用助手，使 Agent 可以并行处理并保持专注。

exact.from: Maximum total size in GB for the Cursor worktrees directory across all workspaces. Set to 0 to disable this limit.
exact.to: 所有工作区中 Cursor 工作树目录的最大总大小（GB）。设为 0 可禁用此限制。

exact.from: Model Context Protocol servers connect Cursor to external tools and data sources like Linear, Figma, and Notion.
exact.to: 模型上下文协议（MCP）服务器可将 Cursor 连接到 Linear、Figma、Notion 等外部工具与数据源。

exact.from: Show warning-level in-app notifications in Glass mode. Errors and informational notifications are always shown.
exact.to: 在 Glass 模式中显示警告级别的应用内通知。错误与信息类通知始终显示。

exact.from: If you enable Privacy Mode, none of your questions or code will ever be stored by us or any third-party.
exact.to: 若启用隐私模式，我们或任何第三方都不会存储你的问题或代码。

exact.from: Plugins bundle rules, skills, subagents, commands, MCP servers, and hooks into one installable package.
exact.to: 插件将规则、技能、子 Agent、命令、MCP 服务器和钩子打包为一个可安装包。

exact.from: Skills package domain-specific knowledge and workflows that Agent applies automatically when relevant.
exact.to: 技能封装领域知识与工作流，Agent 在相关时会自动应用。

exact.from: Controls how shell and edit-file tool calls are displayed and grouped in Editor Agent conversations.
exact.to: 控制 Shell 与编辑文件工具调用在编辑器 Agent 对话中的显示与分组方式。

exact.from: Configure MCP servers in the dashboard to make them available in Cursor on desktop and in the cloud.
exact.to: 在控制台配置 MCP 服务器，以便在桌面版 Cursor 与云端中可用。

exact.from: Controls how shell and edit-file tool calls are displayed and grouped in Glass Agent conversations.
exact.to: 控制 Shell 与编辑文件工具调用在 Glass Agent 对话中的显示与分组方式。

exact.from: Add a hooks.json file to your user, project, or enterprise config to start running custom scripts.
exact.to: 在用户、项目或企业配置中添加 hooks.json 文件以开始运行自定义脚本。

exact.from: Add documentation to use as context. You can also use @Add in Chat or while editing to add a doc.
exact.to: 添加文档用作上下文。也可在聊天或编辑时使用 @Add 添加文档。

exact.from: Cursor periodically removes old worktrees to free disk space. Tune how aggressively cleanup runs.
exact.to: Cursor 会定期清理旧工作树以释放磁盘空间。可调整清理激进程度。

exact.from: Cloud Agents are not available when your privacy mode is set to disable data storage. To use Cloud Agents, please update your privacy settings to allow data storage.
exact.to: 当隐私模式设置为禁用数据存储时，无法使用云端 Agent。若要使用，请更新隐私设置以允许数据存储。

exact.from: Enable hover-expanded state for the Cloud Agents sidebar. When disabled, the sidebar will not expand on hover and will be completely hidden when collapsed.
exact.to: 启用云端 Agent 侧栏悬停展开。禁用后，侧栏不会在悬停时展开，折叠时将完全隐藏。

exact.from: Global list of files to always ignore in Cursor features, across all workspaces. Uses glob patterns. These patterns have the same effect as adding them to a .cursorignore file.
exact.to: 在所有工作区中始终忽略的全局文件列表（用于 Cursor 功能）。使用 glob 模式，效果等同于写入 .cursorignore。

exact.from: Enable performance protection for inline diffs. When enabled, inline diff decorations will be suppressed if there are too many changes to prevent editor unresponsiveness.
exact.to: 启用内联 diff 性能保护。启用后，若更改过多，将抑制内联 diff 装饰以防编辑器卡顿。

exact.from: Windows specific setup. Either an array of commands or a path to a script file relative to this JSON file. Takes precedence over setup-worktree on Windows.
exact.to: Windows 专用设置。可以是命令数组，或相对此 JSON 文件的脚本路径。在 Windows 上优先于 setup-worktree。

exact.from: Setup to run inside a newly created worktree (generic fallback). Either an array of shell commands or a path to a script file relative to this JSON file.
exact.to: 在新创建的工作树中运行的设置（通用回退）。可以是 shell 命令数组，或相对此 JSON 文件的脚本路径。

exact.from: Enable partial accepts for Cursor Tab, using the editor.action.inlineSuggest.acceptNextWord keybinding
exact.to: 启用 Cursor Tab 部分接受，使用 editor.action.inlineSuggest.acceptNextWord 快捷键

exact.from: Use preview box for terminal cmd-k. If turned off, responses are streamed directly into the shell.
exact.to: 终端 Cmd+K 使用预览框。关闭后，回复将直接流入 shell。

exact.from: Move this agent to the Cloud to run longer without your computer open.
exact.to: 将此 Agent 移至云端，即使电脑未开启也可长时间运行。

exact.from: Move to Cloud so the agent can keep running even if you disconnect.
exact.to: 移至云端，即使断开连接 Agent 也可继续运行。

exact.from: The agent's machine is being prepared. This can take a few minutes.
exact.to: 正在准备 Agent 机器，可能需要几分钟。

exact.from: The agent's machine may not be running. Send a message to restart.
exact.to: Agent 机器可能未运行。发送消息以重启。

exact.from: Move to Cloud to keep running longer without your computer open.
exact.to: 移至云端，无需保持电脑开启即可更长时间运行。

exact.from: Rendering very large diffs can slow down or crash the window
exact.to: 渲染超大 diff 可能导致窗口变慢或崩溃

exact.from: Please update your payment method to keep using Cursor.
exact.to: 请更新付款方式以继续使用 Cursor。

exact.from: Balanced quality and speed, recommended for most tasks
exact.to: 质量与速度均衡，推荐用于大多数任务

exact.from: You've hit your rate limit on your current plan
exact.to: 你已达到当前套餐的速率限制

exact.from: Initialize a git repository to create worktrees.
exact.to: 初始化 git 仓库以创建工作树。

exact.from: Enable usage-based pricing for premium models
exact.to: 为高级模型启用按量计费

exact.from: You've hit your 200 Free requests this month
exact.to: 你本月已用完 200 次免费请求

exact.from: I am fine with Cursor learning from my code!
exact.to: 我同意 Cursor 从我的代码中学习！

exact.from: Visualize information in a custom interface
exact.to: 在自定义界面中可视化信息

exact.from: Align on implementation before writing code
exact.to: 在编写代码前对齐实现方案

exact.from: Your handle can't be changed once claimed
exact.to: 用户名一经占用不可更改

exact.from: Discard all changes up to this checkpoint?
exact.to: 丢弃至此检查点的所有更改？

exact.from: Set up usage billing for premium models
exact.to: 为高级模型设置用量计费

exact.from: Discover what Cursor can do for your workflow
exact.to: 了解 Cursor 能为你的工作流做什么

exact.from: Run Mode Disabled by Team Admin
exact.to: 运行模式已由团队管理员禁用

exact.from: Run Mode Controlled by Team Admin (Sandbox Enabled)
exact.to: 运行模式由团队管理员控制（沙箱已启用）

exact.from: Run Mode Controlled by Team Admin
exact.to: 运行模式由团队管理员控制

exact.from: Choose how Agents run tools like command execution, MCP, and file writes.
exact.to: 选择 Agent 如何运行命令执行、MCP 和文件写入等工具。

exact.from: Many commands will run automatically inside the sandbox, and a classifier will run for the actions that cannot run in the sandbox. Allowlists are still respected.
exact.to: 许多命令会在沙箱内自动运行；无法在沙箱中运行的操作将由分类器判断。白名单仍然生效。

exact.from: Many commands will run automatically inside the sandbox, and you can also allowlist other actions.
exact.to: 许多命令会在沙箱内自动运行，你也可以将其他操作加入白名单。

exact.from: A classifier will run for each action and decide whether it's safe to execute this command. Allowlists are still respected.
exact.to: 分类器会评估每个操作是否可安全执行。白名单仍然生效。

exact.from: Prevent Agent from deleting files automatically
exact.to: 阻止 Agent 自动删除文件

exact.from: Prevent Agent from creating or modifying files outside of the workspace automatically
exact.to: 阻止 Agent 自动在工作区外创建或修改文件
已连接到浏览器标签页

exact.from: Automatically open localhost links in the Browser Tab
exact.to: 自动在浏览器标签页中打开 localhost 链接

exact.from: Automatically open http and https links in the Browser Tab
exact.to: 自动在浏览器标签页中打开 http 和 https 链接
自动为 ${r} 导入必要模块

exact.from: Enable auto import for Python. This is a beta feature.
exact.to: 启用 Python 自动导入。这是一项测试版功能。

exact.from: Automatically index any new folders with fewer than

exact.to: 为即时 Grep 索引代码库

exact.from: Automatically index repositories to speed up Grep searches. All data is stored locally.
exact.to: 自动索引代码库以加速 Grep 搜索。所有数据均存储在本地。
将 .cursorignore 文件应用到所有子目录

exact.from: Use with caution. Skip symlinks during .cursorignore file discovery. Enable only when all .cursorignore files are reachable without symlinks
exact.to: 请谨慎使用。在发现 .cursorignore 文件时跳过符号链接。仅当无需符号链接即可访问所有 .cursorignore 文件时再启用

exact.from: Changing this setting requires restarting Cursor.
exact.to: 更改此设置需要重启 Cursor。

exact.from: Accept the next word of a suggestion via ${t.keybindingService.lookupKeybinding("editor.action.inlineSuggest.acceptNextWord")?.getLabel()??"Alt+]"}
exact.to: 通过 ${t.keybindingService.lookupKeybinding("editor.action.inlineSuggest.acceptNextWord")?.getLabel()??"Alt+]"} 接受建议的下一个词

exact.from: Automatically parse links when pasted into Quick Edit (${yr?"\u2318":"Ctrl+"}K) input
exact.to: 粘贴到快速编辑（${yr?"\u2318":"Ctrl+"}K）输入框时自动解析链接

exact.from: Automate repetitive tasks with always-on cloud agents that respond to environment triggers.
exact.to: 使用始终在线的云端 Agent，根据环境触发器自动完成重复任务。

exact.from: Mcw="Automate repetitive tasks with always-on cloud agents that respond to environment triggers."
exact.to: Mcw="使用始终在线的云端 Agent，根据环境触发器自动完成重复任务。"

exact.from: Run agents on a schedule or automatically in response to events. Billed at plan rates.
exact.to: 按计划运行 Agent，或根据事件自动响应。按套餐费率计费。
